def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    atr_window = params['atr_window']
    breakout_multiplier = params['breakout_multiplier']
    ema_window = params['ema_window']
    
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.average_true_range(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_window)
    df['ema'] = ta.trend.ema_indicator(df['close'], window=ema_window)
    
    df['upper_band'] = df['close'] + (df['atr'] * breakout_multiplier)
    df['lower_band'] = df['close'] - (df['atr'] * breakout_multiplier)
    
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[(df['close'] > df['upper_band']) & (df['close'] > df['ema'])] = 1
    signals[(df['close'] < df['lower_band']) & (df['close'] < df['ema'])] = -1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: GBP/USD exhibits volatility clustering where breakouts from recent ranges combined with trend confirmation by EMA indicate sustained directional moves.
